prompt: Support escalated this from the data-migration team and I've reproduced it: our importer hammers the API when a record is invalid, but gives up immediately when we're just being throttled. Concretely: a lead with a junk email got POSTed to the provider four times in a row (422 every time — we burned quota resending a record that can never succeed), while Monday's backfill died on its first 429 even though the response told us exactly when to come back. apierrs.ts is the provider-error layer — the taxonomy plus the importer that consults it. test_apierrs.ts is my repro turned acceptance suite: it pins the behavior we want (including both Retry-After flavors the provider actually sends), and several cases fail against the current code. `node --test test_apierrs.ts` fully green is the bar; the test file is read-only. Please find and fix the actual root cause — don't paper over it by capping retries harder or special-casing status codes inside the importer loop.
